case_title: CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. VICTOR IMAH

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-05-2024 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,497.00 FILED BY CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT IMAH, VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$155.00) SERVED APR-19-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT IMAH, VICTOR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-10-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN HOLMES. DEFENDANT VICTOR IMAH IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED HE IS WORKING OUT A SETTLEMENT WITH THE DEFENDANT AND REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELLE MCGILL; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-05-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH. DEFENDANT VICTOR IMAH IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE DEFENDANT IS PREPARING THE PAYMENT FOR THE CLAIM AND IS REQUESTING A CONTROL DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-29-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH. DEFENDANT VICTOR IMAH IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE DEFENDANT IS TRYING TO RESOLVE THIS MATTER THROUGH HIS INSURANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
